title: Axelera AI | Datacenter Performance, Edge Efficiency
full_text:
Advanced AI that Turns Bold Ideas into Today's Realities
AI inference brings intelligence to your video monitoring and brings your LLMs and VLMs out of the cloud and right where you need them. With Metis® AIPUs starting at 214 TOPs, Europa® at 629 TOPs and the Voyager® SDK with 100+ models, you get high performance, power efficiency, and ease of use all for significantly less than the cost of a GPU.
Technology
High performance AI for every environment
Axelera AI delivers datacenter-level AI inference wherever it's needed, combining purpose-built hardware and software for maximum efficiency and accuracy .
Digital In-Memory Computing
Our proprietary D-IMC technology performs matrix-vector multiplications in-place, eliminating data movement and delivering 50+ TOPs per core at FP32 equivalent accuracy.
Outstanding Energy Efficiency
At 15 TOPs/W, Metis AIPUs run demanding AI workloads at the edge without compromising on power, heat or operational cost.
99.9% Relative Accuracy
Our post-training quantization technique preserves full FP32 equivalent accuracy across a wide range of neural networks with no retraining required.
AI Accelerators
Fast and Efficient AI Inference Hardware that does not break budgets
Get the processing power your application demands, in the form factor your system requires, with a software stack that gets you from model to deployment in hours, not weeks .
Metis M.2 Max Accelerator Card
Learn More
Metis PCIe 1-AIPU Accelerator Card
Learn More
Metis PCIe 4-AIPUs Accelerator Card
Learn More
AI Systems
Build faster with complete AI systems
Available in multiple configurations, each system combines the Metis AIPU with the Voyager® SDK, giving you everything needed to build and deploy high-performance computer vision applications out of the box.
Axelera Metis Compute Board
Order Now
Learn more
Axelera AI Mini PC with M.2 Max
Order Now
Learn more
Metis PCIe System with Dell Pro Slim Plus XE5
Order Now
Learn more
use cases
How Can Your Business Benefit from Inference?
Computer Vision
Industrial Manufacturing
Security & Surveillance
Retail
Robotics
Healthcare
Accelerating AI in Computer Vision
Machine and Computer vision solutions are enabling better analytics and decision making. There are tradeoffs between where you choose to put your CV compute. For example, moving computer vision tasks to the edge, where the data is created and/or captured, brings significant value to users: real-time processing by removing the dependency on a data center or cloud connection; enhanced privacy and security by minimizing data movement; increased scalability by bringing analytics into remote or bandwidth-constrained environments.
Accelerating AI in Industrial Manufacturing
Want to differentiate your industrial equipment? AI in manufacturing serves as a primary source of competitive advantage, enhancing productivity in production lines and warehouses. Metis® – Axelera® AI’s AI acceleration platform – helps you adopt and accelerate edge AI in manufacturing. With Metis, your machine vision and Industry 4.0 equipment can deliver unmatched AI performance.
Accelerating AI in Security Applications
AI-based video analytics plays a significant role in modern Security Systems. It turns cameras from just a video source – that generates a huge amount of unstructured video content – into a smart sensor, which provides valuable data for quick incident investigation and risk prevention. As we look towards the future, the role of AI in security and safety surveillance applications will only grow in importance. The question for security market players is not if they should integrate AI into their solutions, but how they can do so most effectively.
Intelligence That Transforms Retail
Deploy real-time analytics across every customer touchpoint while reducing infrastructure complexity. When advanced AI meets retail innovation, extraordinary customer experiences become standard.
Acceleration AI in Robotics
Robots play an important role in filling gaps in skilled workers or providing a more cost-effective method of manufacturing. They can also enter non-permissive environments, keeping people safe from hazardous or dangerous locations. Adding more intelligence to these systems enables real-time decisions and analysis without needing an internet connection.
Acceleration AI in Healthcare
Shortages of Clinicians are a global problem; leveraging high performance AI at the edge can keep patient data safer while filling critical gaps in today's healthcare systems. AI offers unprecedented opportunities for improving patient outcomes, enhancing operational efficiency, and advancing medical research.
What Our Customers Are Saying
By combining Axelera AI’s cutting-edge neural processing technology with Advantech’s system design expertise and global deployment capabilities, we are enabling customers to deploy cutting-edge AI solutions with greater speed and scalability.
Joey Hsu
Director of Advantech’s Embedded Sector
We chose Axelera AI because of its sovereign technology and long-term availability, bringing fantastic capabilities to the ESA missions. With missions that may take years to develop and that end up staying in space for over a decade, we must choose technology that can continue to perform under non-permissive environments, and without much human intervention.
Gianluca Furano
Senior On-Board Computer Engineer
Advancing energy-efficient, inference-focused AI technologies developed in Europe is essential to meeting the rapidly growing demand for high-performance, sustainable and resilient AI deployments. These innovations will permit Telefonica to enable best-in-class AI solutions that integrate seamlessly with our partners’ platforms from around the globe.
Alberto Sempere
Global Director for Products & Innovation
Ensuring a sovereign, predictable and Europe-based AI supply chain is essential for building resilient edge to HPC systems. Our collaboration with Axelera strengthens our ability to secure long-term availability across our portfolio, from embedded platforms to large-scale datacenter and HPC deployments, this collaboration helps 2CRSI provide a resilient, high performance, cost and power efficient inference solution to our client and partners.
Alain Wilmouth
Chairman/CEO/Co-founder
We are honoured to become Axelera AI’s first distributor in the European region. Axelera AI’s technology is state-of-the-art, offering industry-leading performance and efficiency for edge applications. This partnership enables us to bring a new level of AI capability to our customers, helping them accelerate innovation while reducing development complexity and time-to-market.
Bjoern Krasemann
VP of Sales
Partner Accelerator Network
Building truly exceptional end-user experiences requires partnering across hardware, software, systems and even distribution networks. At Axelera AI, we value each member of the ecosystem and welcome further collaboration.
What's New
Press Release
Axelera AI Secures More Than $250 Million Funding on Global Commercial Growth
Read more
Announcement
Axelera AI Announces Six New Partnerships to Unlock What Edge AI Can Build Next
Read more
Announcement
Axelera Announces Europa AIPU, Setting New Industry Benchmark for AI Accelerator Performance, Power Efficiency and Affordability
Read more
